title: AirGas | Beverage Grade CO2 & Industrial Gas Supply
body_text: AirGas is America's leading CO2 supplier and carbon dioxide distributor, serving beverage manufacturers, food processors, and industrial customers across all 50 states. Our beverage grade CO2 meets FDA 21 CFR requirements and is suitable for carbonating soft drinks, beer, and sparkling water. We supply bulk CO2 via cryogenic tanker, as well as CO2 cylinder and CO2 tank options for smaller operations. Our industrial gas portfolio includes food grade CO2, welding grade carbon dioxide, nitrogen, argon, and specialty blends. With over 1,100 distribution locations nationwide, AirGas guarantees next-day delivery of bulk liquid CO2 to most regions. We also offer dry ice manufacturing services and CO2 reclaim programs for breweries and food-processing plants. Our certified quality program ensures every shipment of beverage carbonation gas meets or exceeds industry purity standards. Contact our industrial gas team for competitive pricing on bulk CO2 contracts and cylinder rental programs.

title: Linde Gas | Carbon Dioxide Distributor — Food & Beverage Grade
body_text: Linde is a global leader in industrial gas and a major CO2 supplier to the North American food, beverage, and manufacturing sectors. Our food grade CO2 and beverage grade CO2 are produced at ISO-certified facilities and tested to ISBT (International Society of Beverage Technologists) purity standards. Linde offers bulk CO2 delivery via specialized cryogenic tankers with real-time telemetry, as well as high-pressure CO2 cylinder filling at our network of fill plants. Our bulk liquid CO2 service includes 24/7 monitoring and automatic reorder triggers to prevent supply interruptions. Linde also manufactures dry ice in solid block, pellet, and slice form for cold-chain logistics. As a vertically integrated carbon dioxide distributor, we operate CO2 recovery and purification units at ammonia plants, ethanol fermenters, and combustion sources. Our welding grade CO2 is used in MIG/MAG welding shielding gas blends. Linde serves breweries, restaurants, hospitals, and fire suppression system operators with reliable industrial gas supply.

title: Praxair CO2 — Bulk CO2 Supply & CO2 Cylinder Sales
body_text: Praxair, now part of Linde plc, has long served as a trusted carbon dioxide distributor and CO2 supplier throughout North America. We specialize in bulk CO2 for large-scale beverage carbonation operations at breweries, soft drink bottlers, and kombucha producers. Our beverage grade CO2 complies with ISBT and NSF standards, ensuring purity above 99.9%. Praxair provides CO2 tank installations ranging from 250-gallon vertical units to 50-ton bulk storage vessels for high-volume users. We also supply CO2 cylinder products in various sizes — from 5 lb portable cylinders to 50 lb upright cylinders — ideal for draft beer systems, home brewing, and aquariums. Our food grade CO2 is used in modified atmosphere packaging (MAP) for extending shelf life of fresh meats, produce, and dairy products. Praxair's industrial gas infrastructure spans thousands of miles of pipeline, connecting production facilities to major industrial hubs. Emergency delivery services are available 365 days a year.

title: Matheson Gas | Industrial Gas & CO2 Supplier
body_text: Matheson is a full-service industrial gas company and CO2 supplier serving diverse markets including semiconductor fabrication, welding, medical, and food service. Our welding grade CO2 is a key component in MAG welding shielding gas mixtures, providing stable arc characteristics and improved weld bead quality. Matheson supplies food grade CO2 for carbonated beverages, wine preservation, and controlled-atmosphere storage in cold-chain logistics. We offer CO2 cylinder rental and exchange programs for restaurants, bars, and home carbonation enthusiasts. Matheson's bulk CO2 infrastructure supports high-volume users including large beverage manufacturers who require continuous tanker deliveries. Our industrial gas safety training program helps customers handle high-pressure CO2 safely in confined spaces and food processing environments. Matheson partners with specialty gas blenders to create custom CO2 mixtures for laboratory calibration standards. With operations across 25 US states, we are a trusted local CO2 supplier and national industrial gas provider.

title: Roberts Oxygen | Local CO2 Supplier — Mid-Atlantic Region
body_text: Roberts Oxygen is a regional gas distributor and local CO2 supplier serving Maryland, Virginia, Washington DC, and surrounding Mid-Atlantic states. We have operated as a family-owned industrial gas business for over 60 years, providing reliable CO2 cylinder delivery, CO2 tank rentals, and bulk liquid CO2 for commercial and industrial customers. Our product lineup includes beverage grade CO2 for draft beer systems and soda fountains, food grade CO2 for controlled-atmosphere packaging, and welding grade CO2 for metal fabrication shops. Roberts Oxygen also maintains a homebrew supply department with 5 lb and 10 lb CO2 cylinder fills for homebrewers and aquarists. Our restaurant gas supply division serves hundreds of DC-area restaurants with CO2 for carbonation systems and espresso machines. We pride ourselves on same-day delivery and 24-hour emergency gas service. Roberts Oxygen is a certified distributor for major industrial gas producers and maintains strict quality standards across all CO2 products.

title: Beverage CO2 Direct | CO2 Cylinder & Bulk Liquid CO2 Products
body_text: Beverage CO2 Direct is an online retailer and regional gas distributor specializing in beverage carbonation products. Our catalog includes CO2 cylinder refills in 5 lb, 10 lb, 20 lb, and 50 lb sizes, as well as N2O cartridge packs for whipping cream and culinary applications. We offer bulk liquid CO2 delivery to breweries, wineries, and kombucha producers in the Pacific Northwest. Our CO2 tank rental program allows restaurants and food processors to scale capacity without capital expenditure. Beverage CO2 Direct sources from ISBT-certified producers to guarantee beverage grade CO2 purity in every shipment. We also carry dry ice products — pellets, blocks, and slices — for cold-chain shipping and event cooling. Our beverage carbonation systems team provides turnkey installation of CO2 distribution manifolds and pressure regulation equipment. Free next-day shipping on CO2 cylinder orders over $75. We serve homebrew supply stores, restaurant chains, and food manufacturing facilities across the western US.

title: Dry Ice USA | Wholesale Dry Ice, Bulk Liquid CO2 & CO2 Tank Supply
body_text: Dry Ice USA is a leading manufacturer and wholesale distributor of dry ice and bulk liquid CO2 for industrial, medical, and food-service applications. Our dry ice is produced on-site from high-purity bulk CO2 feed stock and extruded into standard pellet (3 mm, 6 mm) and block formats for diverse applications. We supply dry ice to pharmaceutical cold-chain logistics providers, grocery distribution centers, and disaster-relief organizations. Our bulk liquid CO2 tanker delivery service covers major metropolitan areas and rural routes across the southeastern United States. Dry Ice USA also maintains a CO2 cylinder exchange program for small businesses, restaurants, and gas distributors who need portable CO2 tank solutions without long-term commitments. Our beverage carbonation division serves craft breweries and fountain drink operators with on-site CO2 tank installation and maintenance. We partner with local homebrew supply shops to stock CO2 cylinders and accessories. Custom dry ice packaging for medical specimens and hazardous material transport is available with regulatory documentation. Contact our wholesale team for bulk pricing.

title: CO2 Market Watch | CO2 Shortage Alert — Supply Disruption Report Q3
body_text: ALERT: A significant CO2 shortage is affecting multiple regions of the United States following unplanned outages at two major ethanol fermentation CO2 recovery facilities. The shortage began in early July and is expected to persist through September as producers work to restore capacity. Several CO2 suppliers have declared force majeure and are allocating remaining bulk CO2 supply to priority customers in food and medical sectors. Beverage manufacturers relying on industrial gas for carbonation are being asked to reduce consumption by up to 30%. The shortage has caused bulk CO2 spot prices to rise 40-60% above contract rates in affected markets. An EPA fine was issued against one facility for operating outside permitted emission parameters during the rush to maximize output. Additionally, a safety violation was documented at a liquefaction plant in the Gulf Coast region where an overpressure event injured two workers. The FDA has not issued a formal recall of any CO2 product but is monitoring purity standards closely. Industry groups are calling for emergency import provisions to bridge the supply gap. Local CO2 suppliers and gas distributors are urged to update their allocation policies and communicate proactively with restaurant gas supply customers.
